---
title: "A Garland for the Year"
---

## A Garland for the Year

**Author:** Elizabeth P. Roberts
**Date:** (January-December 1852)
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> 3-4

### Notes

This series of papers on flowers associated with particular religious seasons and saints does not seem to have been published separately.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
